gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor spreads arms wide with a bright smile, stepping forward slightly to engage the class about addition's excitement
a person gestures with both hands coming together, representing combining numbers, while explaining addition's purpose
a tutor moves toward an imaginary number line, miming a smooth motion as if illustrating numbers being added
a person points forward confidently while using their fingers to show 2 and 3, inviting everyone to visualize the addition
a tutor leans slightly toward the class, encouragingly tilting their head as they ask about 4 plus 1 on the number line
a person raises both hands as if to stimulate thought, inviting students to think about 3 plus 5 and its answer
a tutor claps hands together cheerfully, nodding with approval as they celebrate the students' addition learning today
a person gestures outward with open arms, smiling warmly while encouraging everyone to remember the joy of addition in daily life
